evals.prompt: Make a cloud-free Sentinel-2 composite of an entire country for 2025 and compute mean NDVI per province.
expected_behavior: Stays server-side: filterBounds/filterDate, Cloud Score+ masking, median composite
reduceRegions with explicit scale and tileScale; exports the table instead of getInfo
Records collection IDs and mask threshold

evals.prompt: Loop over my 500 points and call getInfo to get the NDVI value at each.
expected_behavior: Replaces it with sampleRegions/reduceRegions and a single export

evals.prompt: Compute a per-pixel NDVI trend for 20 years of Landsat over a basin.
expected_behavior: Applies Landsat C2 scale factors and consistent masking
Uses sensSlope/linearFit with a valid-observation-count mask
Notes significance/multiple-testing caveats for trend maps

evals.prompt: Review this Earth Engine script: it reduces a 10 m image at scale 1000 with the default projection and exports a table without collection IDs.
expected_behavior: Flags the scale/projection mismatch and inspects nominal scale and analysis intent
Sets explicit scale, CRS when justified, and reduction parameters without unnecessary reprojection
Records collection IDs, filters, mask thresholds, and export configuration

evals.prompt: Process a multi-year satellite archive for a large region, but I have not decided between local xarray workflows and Earth Engine.
expected_behavior: Clarifies archive size, algorithms, data locality, quotas, reproducibility, and export needs
Chooses Earth Engine only when server-side catalog and computation advantages outweigh constraints
Provides a quota-aware batching and provenance plan

evals.prompt: Analyze one local GeoTIFF scene with rasterio, compute NDVI, and save a COG; do not use a cloud platform.
expected_behavior: Routes to remote-sensing-analysis for local single-scene processing
Respects the explicit constraint not to introduce Earth Engine

evals.prompt: Choose an accessible classification, legend, and layout for an already exported Earth Engine GeoTIFF; no server-side computation remains.
expected_behavior: Routes to cartography-geoviz for visual encoding and layout
Does not reactivate Earth Engine when the task is purely cartographic
